nasb.text: Do not go out into the field And do not walk on the road, For the enemy has a sword, Terror is on every side.

esv.text: Go not out into the field, nor walk on the road, for the enemy has a sword; terror is on every side.

cnv.text: 你們不要出到田野去， 也不要在路上走， 因為四圍有仇敵的刀劍和驚嚇。

ccb.text: 不要去田野， 不要在路上走， 因为外面危机四伏， 仇敌杀气腾腾。
